def negative_untracked_asyncio_task():
    rule_id = "untracked_asyncio_task"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "asyncio.create_task(...) or similar task creation whose handle is discarded immediately."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
